{{Quote|You're all over the grid. One minute you're as touchy and surly as a feral bantha, the next you're the meditative Jedi Master, the dear friend, the sensitive fellow. Who are you, Kyp?|Jaina Solo|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>}}
The '''feral bantha''' was a subspecies of the [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Talasea]].<ref name="Moon">''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]''</ref>
